featureType.name: MaC_4_15_GNS_aggregation_sites
featureType.title: Grey Nurse Shark potential aggregation sites (Australia)
featureType.abstract: This dataset consolidates listed, potential and candidate grey nurse shark aggregation sites identified in published literature and expanded through NESP MaC Project 4.15. It brings together site locations, supporting evidence, tagging information and available per-site shark demographic information to provide a consolidated candidate list of potentially important aggregation sites.
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]
